name: LEGGETT & PLATT INC
business: Leggett & Platt is an international diversified manufacturer that conceives, designs, and produces engineered components and products for homes and automobiles, including bedding components, automotive comfort systems, hydraulic cylinders, furniture components, flooring underlayment, and geo components.
sellsTo: Big box retailers, department stores, and home improvement centers
Manufacturers of upholstered and office furniture
Contractors, landscapers, road construction companies, and government agencies

exposures.sentence: Volatility related to the growth of Chinese EV manufacturers and multinational OEM market share challenges are expected to continue to impact the automotive industry.
Among the most important raw materials we use are: ... Electronic systems (including semiconductors).

Our Aerospace Products Group was a supplier of complex, highly-engineered tube and duct assemblies for use primarily in commercial and military aircraft platforms and space launch vehicles.
Our Aerospace Products Group was a supplier of complex, highly-engineered tube and duct assemblies for use primarily in commercial and military aircraft platforms and space launch vehicles.

Market demand (including product mix) is impacted by several economic factors, with housing turnover and consumer confidence being the most significant.

catalysts.event: 2026 Restructuring Plan consolidation of three manufacturing facilities expected to be substantially complete by end of 2026
catalysts.sentence: On February 24, 2026, we committed to a smaller restructuring plan to consolidate two manufacturing facilities in our Specialty Foam business unit in our Bedding Products segment and one manufacturing facility within our Furniture, Flooring & Textile Products segment into other existing facilities (2026 Restructuring Plan). These actions are expected to improve our manufacturing efficiency and enhance profitability and are anticipated to be substantially complete by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Remaining real estate proceeds from 2024 Plan expected in 2026
catalysts.sentence: The remaining real estate sales proceeds are expected to be received during 2026 due to timing of listing properties.

catalysts.event: Incremental EBIT benefit of ~$5 million from 2024 Plan expected in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We realized annualized EBIT benefit of $63 million in 2025 and expect approximately $5 million of incremental EBIT benefit in 2026.

catalysts.event: Pension plan settlement fully expected by mid-2026
catalysts.sentence: At December 31, 2025, the remaining net liability for this plan was $1 million and is expected to be fully settled by mid-2026.
